title: geissanthus bolivianus
intro: Geissanthus bolivianus, a type of flowering plant native to Bolivia, is a member of the primrose family and is also known as the Bolivian geissanthus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Geissanthus bolivianus are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from pain and inflammation, and the improvement of respiratory issues. Geissanthus bolivianus can be prepared as an infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
